summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Share Link and Coach Mode features. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all new features work correctly including share link creation, public shared analysis page, coach dashboard, invite code generation, and athlete join flow.
seed_data_creation: Created test coach user, test athlete user, and test analysis for share link testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Link and Coach Mode features fully tested. Backend APIs: POST /api/share/create, GET /api/share/{share_id}, DELETE /api/share/{share_id}, POST /api/coach/upgrade, POST /api/coach/invite/create, POST /api/coach/join, GET /api/coach/athletes, GET /api/coach/athlete/{id}/analyses, GET /api/coach/me, POST /api/coach/leave. Frontend pages: SharedAnalysisPage.js (public view), CoachDashboardPage.js (coach management), AnalysisPage.js (share button), Sidebar.js (coach menu). All flows verified: share link creation, public access without auth, coach upgrade, invite code generation, athlete joining, coach viewing athlete analyses.
